items.title: Apple names new chief executive to replace Tim Cook
items.summary: John Ternus will take over running the technology giant as Cook steps up to become executive chairman.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple names Johny Srouji as chief hardware officer
items.summary: Apple has appointed Johny Srouji as its new chief hardware officer, "effective immediately," according to an announcement on Monday. He is stepping into the shoes of current har...
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook Is Stepping Down
items.summary: John Ternus, the company’s senior vice president of hardware engineering, will replace Cook as CEO on September 1. Cook will stay on as executive chairman.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
